ubuntu.label: Host Windows → next boot Ubuntu 24.04.4 (configure bcdedit/GRUB entry)
args: AiJIN: Set boot target to Ubuntu 24.04.4 LTS — on Linux host see os-switch.linux-host.example.json.

windows.label: Host Windows → next boot Windows stack
